Work History

Professional Experience

Clutch Tech Auto Services
Dec 2025 – Feb 2026
Android Developer Intern
Remote, Egypt
20% app efficiency gain ~15% memory reduction 5+ leaks resolved ~35% fewer recompositions
  • Architected the account management module across 2 live Android apps, enforcing Clean Architecture and reducing inter-module coupling
  • Improved overall app efficiency by 20% through feature modularization and optimized state handling with Coroutines and Flow, cutting redundant recompositions by ~35%
  • Resolved 5+ memory leaks using LeakCanary — reduced average memory consumption by ~15% and eliminated leak-driven production crashes
  • Shipped 3+ production features across 4 Agile sprint cycles with code reviews and deployment validation
